diagnostics.message: Required property 'readableScopes' is missing at '/0' in 'types.json'.
Required property 'writableScopes' is missing at '/0' in 'types.json'.
Property 'scopeType' at '/0/scopeType' in 'types.json' is a legacy ResourceType scope field. CanonicalWriter packages must use 'readableScopes' and 'writableScopes'.
Property 'readOnlyScopes' at '/0/readOnlyScopes' in 'types.json' is a legacy ResourceType scope field. CanonicalWriter packages must use 'readableScopes' and 'writableScopes'.
